---
title: "Test"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    embed-resources: TRUE
    code-fold: true
    page-layout: full
    fig_caption: yes
    anchor-sections: false 
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Load config file and pregenerated sentences and visualizations
source("R/config.R")
state_for_report <- "Georgia"
source("R/pull_state_findings.R")
```

# Parole Eligibility

TESTING LOGO
```{r}
render_image <- JS("
  function(){
    this.renderer.image('https://avparoleproject.netlify.app/img/csgjc-logo.png', 10, this.chartHeight - 50, 140.1, 30)
    .add();
  }")

x <- c(rnorm(10000), rnorm(1000, 4, 0.5))

hc <- hchart(x, name = "data", color = "#17b8b6") 

hc |> 
  hc_add_dependency(name = "modules/exporting.js") |>
  hc_add_dependency(name = "modules/offline-exporting.js") |>
  hc_exporting(
      enabled = TRUE,
      buttons = list(contextButton = list(menuItems = list("downloadPNG"))),
      chartOptions = list(
        chart = list(
          style = list(fontFamily = "Helvetica"),
          events = list(
            load = render_image
            )
          )
        )
      ) |> 
  hc_chart(
    style = list(fontWeight = 400, fontFamily = "Times New Roman")
  )
```
